dataList.desc:
- A crimson sign или a mark that I've seen on a few people, one of them being Фембойчик.
- It appears that Фембойчик's Sign has the power to summon a version of himself from a period forward in time. Эпштейн said it was a possibility of a certain future, или something akin to an offshoot event of an offshoot world. It certainly felt distinct from having him wear an Identity from a Mirror World.
- Demian's enigmatic words were the first thing that came to my mind когда Фембойчик first awakened the power of his Sign—that he would return когда Фембойчик becomes one with beautiful stars.
- Is drawing all three strokes of his Sign... not what Demian meant by "soaring в the sky, having unshakable faith in the power of the heart"? Well, what else could it be...? It hurts my head just to think about it.
- Если only others could see the Signs, too... I would've asked them for their input. Hmm, that reminds me. Didn't Sonya say something to Rodya about her not having the Sign или being unable to see them?
- Other than myself, the Sinners are the only other people in the world who were there for that conversation, и it's clearly not a good idea to bring this up to Rodya, so... Hmm, who should I ask?

- Мерседес remembered that conversation. Well, of course he did.
- Anyway, I finally found the information I needed. What Sonya had said to Rodya on that day was that she didn't have what it takes to lead.
- It makes me wonder если that condition goes both ways—does having "what it takes to lead" allow one to see the Sign? ... Well, I decided to table that question until the LCE's research could make some progress, since it seemed that they were having trouble making any meaningful discoveries concerning the Sign.
- We sort of have a working theory при this moment, that the Sign may be of the same или similar origin as Singularities и Relics, but... given that I know precious little about those two subjects, this seems to be a case of questions begetting questions.

- While we were helping Hohenheim with the Backdoor investigation, we accidentally stumbled в one of the Ring's galleries—that of the Fauvists, to be specific. Если we're counting Опекун Безымянного Callisto's Corridor a "gallery," then I guess this is the second gallery of the Ring we'd seen.
- Kira seemed to be incredibly impressed by some of the taxidermied animals in there, и... I must admit, some of those were pretty cool, even for me. As for the rest... Well. I don't feel that they necessarily need to be described here.
- Each school of the Ring seems to have pretty distinct ideas on beauty или artistic philosophy. Р.Ё.Ш.У. explained that there were minor schisms even among followers of Fauvism.
- Rufo, that Fauvist Docent, claimed that Р.Ё.Ш.У. is taking the steps toward founding her own movement.
- So... going by how the other Schools are named, will it be something like Abbreviatists? SANGRIAists? Shortenists...? Ooh, maybe Р.Ё.Ш.У.'ll combine и acronymize it all в A.S.S.ists? ... Wait, that doesn't really work...

- Curse my curiosity, because it actually compelled me to pay Р.Ё.Ш.У. a visit и ask her если she was planning on naming her school, what it was going to be called, и various other questions that seemed to annoy her. Needless to say, I was kicked out rather unceremoniously mid-question.
- I don't know how many Schools of art и sects there are in the Ring, but... After hearing Р.Ё.Ш.У.'s philosophy on aesthetics и art, Rufo, a Docent of Fauvists, claimed that they would cultivate her until she could establish her own movement.
- Если, one day, Р.Ё.Ш.У. finally completes her own movement... will the Ring acknowledge her as a Maestro? Hm. I wonder если that means members of Р.Ё.Ш.У.'s School would speak in acronyms, just like she does...

- Wayfarer Company.
- With the recent series of incidents involving Warp Corporation, this new business entity arose to supplant its place as the new W Corp... In other words, a Wing hopeful.
- Эпштейн explained that their core technology, called "Portals," resembles the properties of Backdoors. From my recent, unintended use of them (which has been quite frequent, truth be told), I find them incredibly convenient. The way Portals work, one door leads to another, without requiring a connection to Corridors as Backdoors do.
- I heard that Portals still have some instabilities that may cause side effects, but I don't think I've experienced или witnessed any so far. Considering what Эпштейн и Пригожина have mentioned before, it might simply be because I've only been using expensive portals... but there could be another reason for it.
- Currently, it seems they are working with Limbus Company to establish forward bases throughout the Corridors при Пиццерия Фредди Фазбера и look в the Backdoors within them.
- We had the chance to work with Team Leader Аланfrom here. He has a bit of that corporate attitude, but he's generally amiable и seems favorably disposed toward us. Though... after seeing him straight-up socking Kira out of nowhere, not to mention that unsettling, subtle coldness hiding between his words... Can't blame myself for not wanting to see him as a decent person при the end of the day.
- Аланsaid Wayfarer's primary services include pathfinding, path security, и path maintenance. It doesn't seem like the "paths" he mentioned refer to Corridors, but I doubt I could've gotten a more detailed explanation, considering it's a closely guarded corporate technology.

- A power that strengthens the body, manifested through emotions и the mind. - ... said Vespa и Vergilius, but I'm having a bit of trouble understanding what it is from that explanation alone. That said, I don't think I can do a much better job of describing it. I just see Shin (心) users surrounding themselves with some kind of golden aura, и the next thing I know, they've suddenly become stronger. - To summarize what little I understand, Shin (心) sure seems like an incredible technique that allows people to enhance the strength и durability of their bodies without spending a single coin—и all it needs is some kind of training и meditation. - Vergilius did mention that its output varies depending on one's emotional или mental state... but, well... whatever limitations it has, I don't see why anyone would not use this power... Right? - I asked Team Leader Moses from LCD, who's apparently researching this power, и she said learning и using Shin (心) isn't always the best choice. Moses refused to elaborate further—she said she could explain only once she had properly formed a workable hypothesis.

- Apparently, Sinners are unable to use Shin (心) without overlaying themselves with Айдишки—not while their pact with me holds.

- I was going to ask если I could learn how to use it too, but I missed my chance because Kira asked first... But если Sinners can't use it, I suppose it would накладывает to me as well.

- I wonder если I could use Shin (心) before I lost my memories. Vespa said that someone who had never once reflected on their sins—like Опекун Среднего—would be incapable of even comprehending и using such a power in the first place. Makes me wonder what kind of person I was before my head was swapped for a clock.

- I remember Lei Heng saying that "Mang (望)" is amassing Shin (心) и converting it в a ring of light around the user's body parts или weapons... But since I don't know how exactly that's done, I can only guess that the number of rings serves as a measure of how much stronger the user becomes with it.
- According to the Sinners' experience with Mang и Shin wielders, performing attacks with Mang wrapped around makes the same motion или technique a lot faster и stronger than before. Фишмаэль speculated with some uncertainty that the ring of light itself probably doesn't contain some superpower, but rather acts like a kind of gateway through which power is channeled.
- Пригожина added that the rings might function similarly to the rails of a railgun...
- Since I don't know much about even Shin myself, I wasn't able to ask detailed questions about Mang. The most I got was Vespa complaining that each дополнительный ring nearly doubles the mental strain...
- Come to think of it, why does Mang contain emotions like resentment, dismay, и yearning? Why does Shin, the power of the heart, coalesce в Mang?
- Саня said perhaps it has something to do with hopes и desires being the unseen hands that stir the heart, but I don't think that can sufficiently explain this phenomenon...
